description: Style NoteThe inspiration for this top from mother earth is the retro-esque fusion of the ethnic with smart workwear. This piece epitomizes how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian top. Mother Earth uses hand processed fabrics including natural and Azo free dyes. Woven with slub yarns for an authentic vintage feel. Those interested in colourblocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others, who want to keep their look classic and chic, can pair this with jeggings, and embellished slippers. Product DetailsBeige printed top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a split neckline, has short red sleeves in silk fabric with contrast piping on the cuffs, has a full buttoned placket, pintucks and stitched detailing on the chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
